record_existence_and_kind.command: sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "with ids(alias,target) as (...) select count(*) as ids_checked, sum(case when r.record_kind='project' then 1 else 0 end) as project_kind_count, group_concat(case when r.record_kind is null or r.record_kind!='project' then flat.id end, '|') as non_project_or_missing from flat left join records r on r.record_id=flat.id;"

existing_alias_conflicts.command: sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "with ids(alias,target) as (...) select count(*) as alias_conflicts from ids where exists (select 1 from identity_aliases ia where ia.kind='project' and ia.alias=ids.alias) or exists (select 1 from json_each((select json_extract(readfile('data/identity-overrides/merges.json'),'$.aliases.project'))) ma where ma.key=ids.alias);"

commands.command: sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "with ids(alias,target) as (...) select count(*) as db_do_not_merge_conflicts from ids where exists (select 1 from do_not_merge d where d.kind='project' and ((d.record_id_a=ids.alias and d.record_id_b=ids.target) or (d.record_id_a=ids.target and d.record_id_b=ids.alias)));"

for f in $(rg --files data/review_notes | rg 'codex-identity-batch(0[0-9][0-9]|10[0-2])-prep\.json$' | sort); do jq -r --arg f "$f" '.proposed_aliases[]? | select(.kind=="project") | select(.alias_id=="<candidate alias>") | [.alias_id,.target_id,$f] | @tsv' "$f"; done

forbidden_command_compliance.evidence: Preparation used local deterministic inspection only: rg, jq, sqlite3 data/canonical.db, date, test, git status, and apply_patch to create this artifact. No provider/profile-backed commands or forbidden runner commands were run.
